Pharmacy Prescription Log — March 2024: This log documents all controlled substance prescriptions dispensed during March 2024 per state board requirements. A total of 47 Schedule II prescriptions were filled, including oxycodone, amphetamine salts, and methylphenidate formulations. Each entry includes prescriber DEA number, patient date of birth, quantity dispensed, and pharmacist initials. The log has been reviewed and signed by the pharmacist-in-charge and will be retained for seven years per regulation.
